author: System Migration
topic: Compression Calibration Curves (Fruity Limiter, COMP section)
context: Mapping normalized API values [0,1] to actual dB/ratio values for Fruity Limiter.
observation: Ratio is bidirectional around 0.5 (norm > 0.5 is compression). Compressor is inert at default. Threshold is non-linear.
result: Compression intents must set ratio > 0.5 and lower threshold < 1.0 simultaneously. Table interpolation is required.
tested_values: Swept all 8 COMP parameters + global Gain.
known_pitfalls: Lowering threshold without raising ratio is a silent no-op. Editing LIMIT/GATE params accidentally.
next_recommended_action: Use safe_write_group to apply ratio, threshold, and timing together.
